input.content:
import os

WEB = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), 'apps', 'web')

def test_workflow_page_exists():
    path = os.path.join(WEB, 'app', 'workflows', 'page.tsx')
    assert os.path.exists(path)

def test_workflow_page_has_templates():
    content = open(os.path.join(WEB, 'app', 'workflows', 'page.tsx'), encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'legal-text-format' in content

def test_workflow_page_has_trigger():
    content = open(os.path.join(WEB, 'app', 'workflows', 'page.tsx'), encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'startWorkflow' in content or 'workflow-runs' in content

def test_api_client_has_start_workflow():
    content = open(os.path.join(WEB, 'lib', 'api.ts'), encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'startWorkflow' in content
